Author: meowmeowmeowie1
Name: MyTweak
Punchline: Job rotation toggles + KBM press mirror.
Description: Job rotation toggles and a keyboard/mouse action-press mirror. Includes a master kill-switch (/mytweak disable) and a movable Next Action tracker window (/mytweak tracker) showing the Single-Target and AoE actions your combos would produce right now, plus Burst ARMED/HELD for the current job. The tracker is also served as a capture-safe local web page (open it in a browser your recorder doesn't capture; /mytweak tracker url shows the address). /mytweak burst hold uses per-job preset codes.
Changelog: v1.0.5.27: capture-safe tracker web page (build fix for 1.0.5.26). The Next Action tracker is served at http://127.0.0.1:9876 - open it in a browser your recorder doesn't capture; /mytweak tracker url shows the address. Loopback only; refreshes only while the page is open.
